      "chunk": "Links:\n1. [Make overwriting releases explicit · Issue #269 · softprops/action-gh-release](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/issues/269)\n2. [How to overwrite a release if it already exists ? · Issue #578 · softprops/action-gh-release](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/issues/578)\n3. [GitHub - softprops/action-gh-release: 📦 GitHub Action for creating GitHub Releases · GitHub](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release)\n4. [softprops/action-gh-release](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release?tab=readme-ov-file)\n5. [action.yml at master · softprops/action-gh-release](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/blob/master/action.yml)\n\n# action-gh-release: Handling Existing Releases and Duplicate Assets\n\n## Current Behavior\nBy default, action-gh-release will overwrite an existing release when pushing to an already-used tag, adding new assets alongside old ones without warning.[1][4] This means old files remain in the release with new ones added, rather than replacing them entirely.\n\n## Overwriting Files\nThe action has an &#96;overwrite_files&#96; parameter that defaults to &#96;true&#96;.[5] This controls whether existing files with the same name get overwritten within a release, but doesn't control whether the entire release itself gets replaced.\n\n## Outstanding Issues\nThere are active requests for better control over this behavior:[1][2]\n- Users want the ability to explicitly control whether existing releases should be overwritten, as the current default non-destructive behavior can silently replace published releases without warning\n- Some users need an option to fail or warn when a tag already exists, rather than silently overwriting\n- Others want the ability to completely recreate a release with only the newest files, removing old assets\n\nAs of the latest information, these feature requests remain open without a dedicated boolean flag like &#96;allow_override&#96; to make overwriting explicit.[1]",
      "title": "Web search results for query: softprops action-gh-release existing release overwrite duplicate asset"
    }
  ],

**Checking action version**

I'm reviewing the action.yml for v1 tag to confirm overwrite_files default behavior. The v1 tag may behave differently on commit push when release exists vs. doesn't exist. The v1 tag behaves differently on commit push when a release exists versus when it doesn't, and the user confirmed it doesn't auto-clean previous releases. I'll add a pre-upload cleanup step for specific release tags to prevent conflicts. 

**Handling idempotent reruns**

I'm implementing pre-upload cleanup to delete existing releases and tags for idempotent reruns. I'm adjusting the cleanup order to delete tags before updating them to avoid losing the tag reference. I'm adjusting the release workflow to delete both tag and release before recreating them for consistent reruns. I'm adding `continue-on-error: true` to the delete step to handle first-time releases gracefully. 

I'm reordering the delete and update-tag steps to avoid deleting tags before they're moved locally. I'm adjusting delete_release behavior to preserve tags during re-runs while maintaining pre-release tag handling. 

I found that delete_release: true deletes both the tag and release in dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release. I'm clarifying the flow for first-time releases to ensure tag handling is idempotent. 

**Updating release workflow**

I'm updating build-release.yaml to align action-gh-release with v2 for consistency. I'm adding a delete step to build-release.yaml to clean up previous releases before creating new ones. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


确认：`build-release.yaml` 在本地执行了 `clean` 并删除 `app/build`，但 GitHub 上的 Release 不会被清理。`build-pre-release.yaml` 在发版前用 `delete-tag-and-release` 删除旧的 `Prerelease-alpha`。正式版 workflow 缺少该步骤，重复用同一 tag 发版或重跑 workflow 时，`softprops/action-gh-release` 可能与已存在的 Release/资产冲突。正在把与 pre-release 相同的“先删远程 tag + release（失败则忽略）→ 再 update-tag → 再上传”流程加入 `build-release.yaml`。

---

## 结论

**会清本地，不会清 GitHub 上的 Release。**

| 层级 | `build-release.yaml` 里有没有清 |
|------|----------------------------------|
| Runner 工作区 / Gradle 产物 | 有：`clean`、`rm -rf app/build` 等，每次 job 也是新虚拟机 |
| **GitHub Release（网页上那个）** | **原来没有** — 和 `build-pre-release.yaml` 不同 |

`build-pre-release.yaml` 里在发版前有：

```125:130:f:\work\ClashMetaForAndroid\.github\workflows\build-pre-release.yaml
      - uses: dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release@v1.1
        with:
          tag_name: Prerelease-alpha
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          delete_release: true
```

正式版 workflow 之前**没有**等价步骤，所以**同一 `release-tag` 重跑、或修正后重新发同一版**时，远程已有 Release/同名附件，容易和 `action-gh-release` 冲突，你就只能手动删 Release。

---

## 已做的修改

在 `.github/workflows/build-release.yaml` 里已加上与 pre-release 相同的逻辑：

1. **`Delete existing GitHub release and tag (if any)`**：用 `dev-drprasad/delete-tag-and-release` 删掉该 `release-tag` 对应的远程 tag 和 Release；`continue-on-error: true`，**首次发版**没有可删对象时不会把整个 job 弄挂。  
2. 仍由 **`Tag Repo`（update-tag）** 把 tag 指到当前提交。  
3. **`Upload Release`** 改为 **`softprops/action-gh-release@v2`**，与 pre-release 一致，对新版 API 更稳。

这样一般不必再为「清上次 release」手动点删除；若你希望**绝不删远程 tag**（只删 Release 资产），需要换用只删 Release 的 API/Action，可以再单独改一版。
